title: isolepis setacea
intro: Isolepis setacea, also known as Setaceous Club-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Isolepis setacea include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve congestion and soothe irritated airways. Herbal preparations of Isolepis setacea can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory disorders.
